text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital and I are on a walk discussing our
race schedule when we pass a pair of Umamusume
who look really close.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I told you it's hard to walk with you
hanging onto me like that!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I think I just felt... my moe senses tingling... Or
maybe I'm just imagining things...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! Sorry about that... So, uh, what were
we talking about again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be really tired to pass up a simping
opportunity. I should probably look over her race
schedule moving forward.
